text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was so fast... Man, it sucks knowing I
still don't have what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was so fast... Man, it sucks knowing I
still don't have what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You're right. I need to believe in my potential!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey-hey, let's have an evaluation meeting right
now! We need a plan if we're going to win the
next one!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm right there with you! I'll definitely win
first in my next race!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let's figure out what kind of training regime I
need to make that happen!
